description_long: This object is a pump-action shotgun with a classic design, featuring a long, blued steel barrel and a wooden stock and fore-end. The stock is full-sized, made of polished wood with a visible grain and a colored band near the butt. The fore-end is ribbed for grip and also constructed from wood, matching the stock. The receiver and barrel are metallic, with the barrel extending well past the wooden fore-end and including a tubular magazine beneath. The trigger guard is rounded and metallic, enclosing a single trigger. The overall finish is a combination of matte and glossy surfaces, with the wood providing a warm contrast to the dark metal.
description: A pump-action shotgun with a long blued barrel, wooden stock, and ribbed wooden fore-end. The design is classic, with a rounded trigger guard and a colored band on the stock.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the wooden stock, ribbed fore-end, and long barrel.
description_view_1: Front-on view emphasizing the narrow profile of the barrel and fore-end, with minimal stock visibility.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the wooden stock, fore-end, and barrel.
description_view_3: Rear-on view showing the butt of the stock and the alignment of the barrel and fore-end.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a visible tubular magazine beneath and a ventilated rib along the top of the barrel
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized metallic trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves
